vocab.example: Being behind the wheel gives me a sense of liberation, as I can decide my own route and pace.
I prefer being a passenger because I can simply recline the seat and take a short nap during long journeys.

vocab.meaning: sự tập trung không bị gián đoạn
vocab.example: Driving requires uninterrupted focus, which I find quite therapeutic as it clears my mind of other worries.
I enjoy the role of a passive observer, soaking in the city's sights while someone else handles the stressful traffic.

vocab.meaning: sự am hiểu và nâng niu máy móc (xe cộ)
vocab.example: As a driver with a bit of mechanical sympathy, I like to feel how the engine responds to my touch on the pedals.
